falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 rises by 10% over the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the blowoff pattern and suggest the current phase is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average by 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish crossover would indicate a shift in momentum, invalidating the expectation of a bearish blowoff or consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The trading volume in the S&P 500 drops below 50% of the 90-day average daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volume would signal lack of market participation, contradicting the blowoff score and suggesting the pattern is not materializing.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
